name: glean-browser-template
notes: Use only against an approved Glean tenant, approved account, and approved test data.
Run with --headed first so the persistent profile can complete SSO login manually.
Customize selectors after inspecting your tenant UI. Glean DOM attributes can differ by tenant, feature surface, and release.
For indexed-document tests, set send_documents_inline to false after you have placed the test documents in an approved indexed sandbox source.
